title: Residential Care and Disability Support Services Act 2018 (NZ)
description: New Zealand legislation governing funding, assessment, and liability for long-term residential care and home-based disability support services. Establishes means testing, needs assessment procedures, and funder obligations for qualifying persons and special case persons.

source.page_title: Residential Care and Disability Support Services Act 2018 | New Zealand Legislation
